form_name: O2C - OS4 Pre-cubing & Load Planning Tool

questions.text: What is the primary function of the OS4 Pre-cubing & Load Planning Tool?
options: To manage Sales Orders and validate blocked orders
To create outbound deliveries and simulate truck capacity optimization
To process invoices and manage payments
To optimize the scheduling of production tasks

questions.text: What is one key benefit of running OS4 in the Background scenario?
options: Time savings with minimal user interference

questions.text: Which of the following is not a grouping criterion for planning scenarios in OS4?
What is a mandatory check for Master Data (MD) to ensure smooth processing in OS4?
options: Ensuring data compatibility with international codes

questions.text: What is a key advantage of combining several Sales Orders or Stock Transfer Orders (SO/STO) in one truck using OS4?
options: Optimized truck utilization and reduced transportation costs
Enhanced accuracy of pallet-level inventory tracking
